description: Designed and developed automation systems for sales data integration and customer analysis.
highlights: Designed and developed a web-based system to integrate, analyze, and reconcile sales and banking data, eliminating 100% manual data entry and reducing operational errors by 20%.
Built an intelligent sales assistant system that automated customer data scraping and analysis, resulting in 10% higher call targeting accuracy and a 5% increase in conversion rate.

description: Built data pipelines and AI modules for educational content processing and metadata generation.
highlights: Established a data pipeline for scraping and normalizing educational content from various online sources, reducing data access time by 70% and tripling (3x) the processed data volume.
Designed and implemented AI modules to automatically generate new metadata fields, enriching training datasets.

description: Customized and developed WordPress themes and managed multiple e-commerce and corporate websites.
highlights: Customized and developed WordPress themes using Elementor and custom code (PHP, HTML, CSS) to address specific client requirements and fix detailed issues.
Managed and developed content for multiple e-commerce and corporate websites.
